reason: The score and justifications are strongly supported by fan/critic consensus. Multiple sources confirm: Percy has no dialogue after PoA, is entirely absent from GoF and HBP, his family betrayal and Ministry alignment arc is cut, the letter to Ron is absent, and his DH reconciliation is a blink-and-miss-it cameo with no context. The surface pomposity being preserved in early films while all internal depth (ambition, shame, family conflict) is stripped is exactly what critics describe. The one minor caveat keeping this from a 10 is that some critics argue the films at least gestured at the Ministry alignment (he appears as a background Ministry figure in OotP), which the scorer acknowledges - so the partial credit given to personality (14/25) for early-film surface traits is reasonable. The 49/100 total is arguably even generous given how thoroughly the arc was gutted.
